jobs.prompt:
You are working in /Users/nate/Praxis/Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/.

Fix CSS issues in the quadrant grid:

1. src/grid/QuadrantGrid.css:
- Don't render empty dashed-border cells for unfilled quadrants. Change .quadrant-empty to be invisible (display: none or visibility: hidden)
- Ensure grid columns don't crush below 200px even at narrow viewports
- Add smooth transition on quadrant-cell for hover/drag states

2. src/grid/QuadrantGrid.tsx:
- Don't render empty quadrant cells at all (return null for cells with no module AND no neighbor span)
- This prevents the dashed box clutter

3. Verify the grid looks clean at 1400px, 1024px, and 768px widths.

Write the updated files.
